steps.t: The mere can be found far to the north and slightly east of Linhir in Dor-en-Ernil. Tancestel has asked you to bring his river-stone to the great mere…
The pile of river-stones can be found at the edge of the mere along the Gilrain. You have arrived at the mere on the Gilrain and should now place Tanc…
The mysterious woman can be found on the banks of the mere. You have placed the stone, and now a mysterious woman has appeared. If what Tancestel said…
The mysterious woman can be found on the banks of the mere. You have honoured the mysterious woman and should now attempt to speak with her.
The centre of the mere can be found in north-eastern Dor-en-Ernil. The mysterious woman has begun to walk into the centre of the mere. You should foll…
Roamingstar can be found in her glade in north-eastern Dor-en-Ernil. You have been ferried to a beautiful glade by the mysterious woman, and should no…
